title: Remove Helmet
description: A datapack/mod that lets players move items from their head very useful against Curse of Blinding.
body:
Tired of being stuck with that helmet when a Curse of Binding or Curse of Blinding strikes? This lightweight datapack/mod adds a simple trigger command that allows you to instantly remove your helmet without any hacks or cheats.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Video Demo
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/czMK-HF737U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Features
* **Simple Command:**
  Use `/trigger remove_helmet` to instantly remove your helmet. No confusing setups, no extra permissions needed.
* **Curse-Proof:**
  Works even if your helmet is cursed with Curse of Binding or other restrictive enchantments.
* **Lightweight & Compatible:**
  Minimal footprint, fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft and other datapacks/mods.
* **Safe & Clean:**
  Fully respects vanilla game mechanics outside of helmet removal.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### How to Use
1. Install the datapack/mod into your world or server.
2. Run `/trigger remove_helmet clean` in the chat.
3. Watch your helmet magically return to your inventory!

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Ideal For
* Survival players frustrated by Curse of Binding helmets.
* Adventure maps where helmet removal is part of gameplay.
* Servers looking to add quality-of-life features without altering gameplay balance.
